summary: Backend Refactor Phase 3 - REGRESSION TEST PASSED. All 26 tests pass. Comparison sheet routes (POST generate, GET retrieve) migrated from server.py to routes/comparison_sheets.py work correctly. Business logic in services/comparison_sheet_service.py handles venue data enrichment, availability status calculation, and sheet storage. All previous phase migrations verified working.

minor.issue: Had unused import `Any` from typing module

critical_code_review_comments: routes/comparison_sheets.py: Clean implementation with proper auth (require_role for rm/admin) and audit logging
services/comparison_sheet_service.py: Well-structured service layer with venue data enrichment - calculates availability status based on available vs blocked slots
Comparison sheet properly stores generated sheets in MongoDB for later retrieval
Public GET endpoint allows sharing comparison sheets without authentication (good for client sharing)
Proper validation: requires exactly 3-5 venues for comparison
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data (lead_e5969bb2cc83 with 4 shortlisted venues)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactor Phase 3 regression test complete. Comparison sheet routes successfully migrated from server.py to routes/comparison_sheets.py with business logic in services/comparison_sheet_service.py. Endpoints tested: (1) POST /api/leads/{lead_id}/comparison-sheet - generate comparison sheet (3-5 venues required, returns enriched venue data with availability status) (2) GET /api/comparison-sheets/{sheet_id} - public retrieval for sharing. Previous migrations verified: Phase 1 (auth, venues), Phase 2 (availability, holds), Legacy routes (leads, control-room, payments). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_comparison_sheets_regression.py
